Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.types

Class YouTubeLiveInfo

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.types.YouTubeLiveInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
LiveInfo
public class YouTubeLiveInfo extends Object implements LiveInfo
Metadata for a YouTube live broadcast.
Since:
1.0.0

    Description
    YouTubeLiveInfo(String videoId, String channelId, String channelName, String title, boolean live, String startTimestamp, String endTimestamp, int viewerCount)
    Creates a live info object.

    Returns the channel ID.

    Returns the channel display name.

    Returns the actual end timestamp when available.

    Returns the live flag.

    Returns the scheduled or actual start timestamp.

    Returns the viewer count reported by YouTube.

    Returns whether the broadcast is currently live.

  • Constructor Details

    • YouTubeLiveInfo

      public YouTubeLiveInfo(String videoId, String channelId, String channelName, String title, boolean live, String startTimestamp, String endTimestamp, int viewerCount)
      Creates a live info object.
      Parameters:
      videoId - the video ID
      channelId - the channel ID
      channelName - the channel name
      title - the live title
      live - live state
      startTimestamp - broadcast start timestamp
      endTimestamp - broadcast end timestamp
      viewerCount - current viewer count

  • Method Details

    • isLive

      public boolean isLive()
      Returns whether the broadcast is currently live.
      Specified by:
      isLive in interface LiveInfo
      Returns:
      true if live, otherwise false

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the broadcast title.
      Specified by:
      getTitle in interface LiveInfo
      Returns:
      broadcast title

      public String getVideoId()
      Returns the YouTube video ID.

      Returns the channel ID.

    • getChannelName

      public String getChannelName()
      Returns the channel display name.
      Returns:
      channel name

    • getLive

      public boolean getLive()
      Returns the live flag.
      Returns:
      true if live, otherwise false

    • getStartTimestamp

      public String getStartTimestamp()
      Returns the scheduled or actual start timestamp.
      Returns:
      start timestamp, or null

    • getEndTimestamp

      public String getEndTimestamp()
      Returns the actual end timestamp when available.
      Returns:
